CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float64);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE greater(value, 15.0);
CREATE TABLE another_table (key UInt32, amount Float64);
SELECT a.id FROM test_table AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.id = b.key WHERE greater(b.amount, a.value);
CREATE TABLE more_test_table (user_id UInt32, score Float64, category String);
SELECT user_id FROM more_test_table WHERE score > (SELECT AVG(score) FROM more_test_table WHERE category = 'A') AND score > 20.0;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM another_table WHERE key < 3);
WITH high_scores AS (SELECT user_id FROM more_test_table WHERE score > 20.0) SELECT * FROM high_scores WHERE user_id > 1;
